clan.name: YOUR_CLAN_NAME
clan._roster_note: Optional: list known member names for fuzzy-match validation. Leave empty to skip.

gift_region._note: Crop region for gift list. Calibrated from real 1280x720 screenshots.

chest_counter._multi_frame_note: Take N screenshots per page and compare for consensus. 2 is reliable, 3 is paranoid.

vision._verify_note: Use routine model for most extractions. If confidence < threshold, re-run with verify model.

chat_bridge._channel_filter_note: List of channel_url prefixes to capture. Empty = capture all. Example: ['clan_channel_', 'triumph_realm_channel_298']
chat_bridge._ignored_note: Nicknames to not forward (e.g., bot accounts, system messages)
